post.description:
Synthesize speech with ultra-low latency over a streaming connection.
Choose the `Base URL` from the URL dropdown (Global URL or a pinned Region)

**Note**: Global URL auto-routes to the nearest region.
| Region         | URL                                       | Default Concurrency |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- | -------------------- |
| Global (Routes to the nearest server) | `https://global.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`     | Region specific concurrency |
| US-East                   | `https://us-east.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`    | 15 |
| US-West                   | `https://us-west.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`    | 2 |
| India                     | `https://in.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| Canada                    | `https://ca.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| South Korea               | `https://kr.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| UAE                       | `https://me.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| Japan                     | `https://jp.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| Australia                 | `https://au.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| EU (Central)              | `https://eu-central.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream` | 2 |
| UK                        | `https://uk.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`         | 2 |
| South America (São Paulo) | `https://sa-east.api.murf.ai/v1/speech/stream`    | 2 |

402.description: Expired subscription or character limit exhausted

post.description: Returns a url to the generated audio file along with other associated properties.

402.description: Expired subscription or character limit exhausted

get.description: Returns a list of available voices for speech synthesis

post.description: Returns a url to the generated audio file along with other associated properties.

402.description: Expired subscription or character limit exhausted

audio_duration.description: This parameter allows specifying the duration (in seconds) for the generated audio. If the value is 0, this parameter will be ignored. Only available for Gen2 model.

encode_output_as_base64.description: Set to true to receive audio in response as a Base64 encoded string along with a url.

format.description: Format of the generated audio file. Valid values: MP3, WAV, FLAC, ALAW, ULAW

multi_native_locale.description:
Specifies the language for the generated audio, enabling a voice to speak in multiple languages natively. Only available in the Gen2 model.
Valid values: "en-US", "en-UK", "es-ES", etc.

Use the GET /v1/speech/voices endpoint to retrieve the list of available voices and languages.

pronunciation_dictionary.description:
A JSON string that defines custom pronunciations for specific words or phrases. Each key is a word or phrase, and its value is an object with `type` and `pronunciation`.

Example 1: '{"live": {"type": "IPA", "pronunciation": "laɪv"}}'

Example 2: '{"2022": {"type": "SAY_AS", "pronunciation": "twenty twenty two"}}'

retain_accent.description: Set to true to retain the original accent of the speaker during voice generation.

retain_prosody.description: Indicates whether to retain the original prosody (intonation, rhythm, and stress) of the input voice in the generated output.

return_transcription.description: Set to true to include a textual transcription of the generated audio in the response.

style.description: The voice style to be used for voiceover generation.

transcription.description: This parameter allows specifying a transcription of the audio clip, which will then be used as input for the voice changer

variation.description: Higher values will add more variation in terms of Pause, Pitch, and Speed to the voice. Only available for Gen2 model.

voice_id.description: Use the GET /v1/speech/voices API to find supported voiceIds. You can use either the voiceId (e.g. en-US-natalie) or just the voice actor's name (e.g. natalie).

402.description: Expired subscription or character limit exhausted

get.description: Generates an auth token for authenticating your requests

400.description: Bad request or missing api-key header

priority.description: Priority of the job. Allowed values: LOW, NORMAL, HIGH
Priority of the job. Allowed values: LOW, NORMAL, HIGH

PronunciationDetail.title: PronunciationDetail

model.description: The model to use for audio output. Defaults to FALCON for all the regions except US-East. Valid values: FALCON, GEN2

format.description: Format of the generated audio file.Valid values: MP3, FLAC, WAV, ALAW, ULAW, OGG, PCM

multiNativeLocale.description:
This field is superseded by `locale` field. Please migrate to `locale` field to ensure compatibility with future API versions.

Specifies the language for the generated audio, enabling a voice to speak in multiple languages natively.
Valid values: "en-US", "en-UK", "es-ES", etc. Use the GET /v1/speech/voices endpoint to retrieve the list of available voices and languages.

locale.description:
Specifies the language for the generated audio, enabling a voice to speak in multiple languages natively.
Valid values: "en-US", "en-UK", "es-ES", etc. Use the GET /v1/speech/voices endpoint to retrieve the list of available voices and languages.

sampleRate.description: Valid values are 8000, 16000, 24000, 44100, 48000. Defaults to 24000 for Falcon model and 44100 for Gen2 model.

style.description: The voice style to be used for voiceover generation.

text.description: The text that is to be synthesised. e.g. 'Hello there [pause 1s] friend'

variation.description: Higher values will add more variation in terms of Pause, Pitch, and Speed to the voice. Only available for Gen2 model.

voiceId.description: Use the GET /v1/speech/voices API to find supported voiceIds. You can use either the voiceId (e.g. en-US-natalie) or just the voice actor's name (e.g. natalie).

GenerateSpeechRequestModelVersion.description: Valid values: GEN2. Audio will be generated using the new and advanced GEN2 model. Outputs from GEN2 sound more natural and high-quality compared to earlier models.
GenerateSpeechRequestModelVersion.title: GenerateSpeechRequestModelVersion

audioDuration.description: This parameter allows specifying the duration (in seconds) for the generated audio. If the value is 0, this parameter will be ignored. Only available for Gen2 model.

encodeAsBase64.description: Set to true to receive audio in response as a Base64 encoded string instead of a url. This enables zero retention of audio data on Murf's servers.

format.description: Format of the generated audio file. Valid values: MP3, WAV, FLAC, ALAW, ULAW, PCM, OGG

modelVersion.description: Valid values: GEN2. Audio will be generated using the new and advanced GEN2 model. Outputs from GEN2 sound more natural and high-quality compared to earlier models.

multiNativeLocale.description:
This field is superseded by `locale` field. Please migrate to `locale` field to ensure compatibility with future API versions.

Specifies the language for the generated audio, enabling a voice to speak in multiple languages natively. Only available in the Gen2 model.
Valid values: "en-US", "en-UK", "es-ES", etc. Use the GET /v1/speech/voices endpoint to retrieve the list of available voices and languages.

locale.description:
Specifies the language for the generated audio, enabling a voice to speak in multiple languages natively. Only available in the Gen2 model.
Valid values: "en-US", "en-UK", "es-ES", etc. Use the GET /v1/speech/voices endpoint to retrieve the list of available voices and languages.

style.description: The voice style to be used for voiceover generation.

text.description: The text that is to be synthesised. e.g. 'Hello there [pause 1s] friend'

variation.description: Higher values will add more variation in terms of Pause, Pitch, and Speed to the voice. Only available for Gen2 model.

voiceId.description: Use the GET /v1/speech/voices API to find supported voiceIds. You can use either the voiceId (e.g. en-US-natalie) or just the voice actor's name (e.g. natalie).

wordDurationsAsOriginalText.description: If set to true, the word durations in response will return words as the original input text. (English only)

consumedCharacterCount.description: Number of characters consumed so far in the current billing cycle.

remainingCharacterCount.description: Remaining number of characters available for synthesis in the current billing cycle.

accent.description: This field has been deprecated. Please refer to 'supportedLocales.detail' instead.

availableStyles.description: This field has been deprecated. Please refer to 'supportedLocales.availableStyles' instead.

displayLanguage.description: This field has been deprecated. Please refer to 'supportedLocales.detail' instead.

audio_file.description: The URL or path of the generated audio file.

audio_length_in_seconds.description: Length of the generated audio in seconds.

encoded_audio.description: Base64 encoded string of the generated audio. Used when audio is returned directly in the response.

remaining_character_count.description: Remaining number of characters available for synthesis in the current billing cycle.

transcription.description: Transcript of the generated audio, if transcription was requested.

warning.description: Any warning or informational message related to the audio generation process.

targetLanguage.description: The language code for the target translation

expiryInEpochMillis.description: The timestamp at which the generated token will expire - in Unix time.
